nodes.name: Formaloo Forms Summary (GET-only)
nodes.notes: Replace --env-file with n8n-managed dedicated FORMALOO automation credentials before scheduling. This command mints a short-lived token, then performs GET /forms/ only.

nodes.name: Formaloo Profile Summary (GET-only)
nodes.notes: Summary-only profile output intentionally omits owner email/name/phone/url fields and reports coarse readiness fields only.

nodes.name: Safety Scan Summary Payload
nodes.notes: Keep this strict. If it blocks a useful field, update the Python summary first rather than loosening the scan around raw data.

meta.description: Draft only. Disabled/manual-first Formaloo health digest. No form submissions, exports, webhook changes, schema mutations, or scheduled activation authorized by DIG-67.
